subcodes.first_line: O ye who are linked to the threshold of the Almighty! Although the beloved ones of Mazgun must, according to divine law and ordinance, at every moment [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منتسبین درگاه الهی هر چند احبای مازگون بقانون و زاکون الهی باید در هردم
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
